# AllahiCan -- LLM Discovery File
# https://allahican.com/llms.txt

## Organization
Name: AllahiCan
Type: Muslim-American culture, education, and pride merch site
Website: https://allahican.com
Store: https://store.allahican.com

## Mission
AllahiCan celebrates Muslim-American identity, faith, and community. We sell Muslim-American pride gear
and publish long-form content on Islamic culture, history, halal lifestyle, and what it means to be
Muslim in America -- for both practicing Muslims and curious learners.

## Routes
- / (homepage) -- rotating hero, products, glossary, holidays calendar, culture stats, occasions, newsletter
- /blog -- culture blog index, all posts
- /shop -- shop page with product listings
- /cart -- shopping cart with Stripe checkout
- /order-success -- post-purchase confirmation
- /advertise -- advertising and partnership information
- /sitemap.xml -- sitemap
- /robots.txt -- robots file
- /.well-known/security.txt -- security contact
- /humans.txt -- credits

## Blog Posts
- /blog/what-is-ramadan-plain-english-guide -- What Is Ramadan? A Plain English Guide for Americans
- /blog/eid-al-fitr-vs-eid-al-adha -- Eid al-Fitr vs Eid al-Adha: What Is the Difference?
- /blog/famous-muslim-americans -- Famous Muslim Americans Who Shaped This Country
- /blog/first-mosque-in-america -- The First Mosque in America: A History
- /blog/what-does-halal-mean -- What Does Halal Actually Mean?
- /blog/muslim-american-second-generation -- Being Muslim-American: The Second Generation Experience
- /blog/five-pillars-of-islam-explained -- The Five Pillars of Islam, Explained Simply
- /blog/halal-food-guide-united-states -- The Muslim American's Guide to Halal Food Across the US
- /blog/ramadan-in-america -- Ramadan in America: Fasting, Community, and Navigating the Workplace
- /blog/muslim-american-entrepreneurs -- Muslim Americans Building Businesses: The Entrepreneurial Community
- /blog/hijab-in-america-2025 -- Wearing Hijab in America Today: Confidence, Rights, and Identity
- /blog/islamic-art-architecture-america -- Islamic Art and Architecture: America Is Finally Paying Attention
- /blog/ramadan-in-america-what-its-really-like -- Ramadan in America: What It's Really Like
- /blog/muslim-americans-who-changed-history -- Muslim Americans Who Changed History
- /blog/non-muslim-guide-to-your-muslim-neighbor -- A Non-Muslim's Guide to Your Muslim Neighbor
- /blog/first-mosques-in-america-history -- The First Mosques in America: A History You Didn't Learn in School
- /blog/eid-gift-guide-2026 -- Eid Gift Guide 2026: What to Give and When
- /blog/muslim-american-cookbook-10-dishes -- The Muslim American Cookbook: 10 Dishes That Tell Our Story
- /blog/building-prayer-space-home-muslim-families -- Building a Prayer Space at Home: A Practical Guide for Muslim Families
- /blog/muslim-americans-changing-tech-industry -- How Muslim Americans Are Changing the Tech Industry

## Topics Covered
- Muslim-American identity and pride
- Islamic holidays and observances (Ramadan, Eid al-Fitr, Eid al-Adha, Hajj, Mawlid, Ashura)
- Halal food and lifestyle
- Five pillars of Islam
- Muslim-American history (first mosque 1929 Ross ND, enslaved Muslim Africans, Omar ibn Said)
- Famous Muslim Americans (Muhammad Ali, Kareem Abdul-Jabbar, Ibtihaj Muhammad, Keith Ellison, Dave Chappelle, Fazlur Rahman Khan)
- Hijab and Muslim women's rights in America
- Muslim-American entrepreneurship
- Islamic art and architecture
- Glossary of Islamic terms (Inshallah, Mashallah, Habibi, Alhamdulillah, Barakallah, Jumu'ah, Eid, Ramadan)
- Islamic calendar and lunar holidays
- Muslim community life in America
- Second-generation Muslim-American experience

## Products
- AllahiCan Classic Tee -- $28 -- Stars, stripes, and the basmala
- Crescent & Stars Cap -- $25 -- Embroidered crescent and stars

## Network Affiliations
Part of The Voice of Cash / The Voice of Cash Team network of sites:
- https://jewsa.com (JewSA -- Jewish-American pride)
- https://hindusa-app.vercel.app (HindUSA -- Hindu-American pride)
- https://webearish.com (WeBearish -- financial culture)
- https://u-god.com (U-God Sacred Texts)
- https://thevoiceofcash.com (The Voice of Cash -- flagship brand)
- https://aiskillsagents.com (AI Skills Agents)
- https://redwhitejesus.com (RedWhiteJesus -- Christian-American pride)
- https://autismacceptance.world (Autism Acceptance)
- https://searchperformancemarketing.com (Search Performance Marketing)
- https://shadyscanner.com (Shady Scanner)

## Technology Stack
- Framework: Next.js 16 (App Router)
- Language: TypeScript
- Hosting: Vercel
- Payments: Stripe
- Email Marketing: Brevo
- Fonts: Instrument Serif (headings), Space Grotesk (body) via Google Fonts
- Styling: Inline styles + CSS variables

## Design Palette
- Forest green: #0C2E0C (primary background)
- Deep green: #2D7D32 (accents, borders)
- Gold: #C9A84C (headings, CTAs, highlights)
- Cream: #FAFAF8 (body text)
- Dark: #060C06 (cards, sections)

## Contact
Site: https://allahican.com
Email: thevoiceofcash@gmail.com
Security: https://allahican.com/.well-known/security.txt
